source_mission.statement: Build a cohesive, integrated collective intelligence symbiote that helps humans and agents think, feel, remember, coordinate, and evolve together.

lanes.name: c_lawd
lanes.focus: semantics, relational intelligence, memory meaning, doctrine

tasks.title: [Dali] Canonicalize mission state across UI, API, and files
tasks.description: Keep Source mission state consistent across the backend, task board, and canonical artifacts.
tasks.definition_of_done: Keep Source mission state consistent across the backend, task board, and canonical artifacts and the canonical artifact at workspace/source-ui/source_mission.json is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Canonical mission state now stays aligned across UI, API, and mission artifacts.

tasks.title: [Dali] Persist mission task mutations to the machine-readable portfolio
tasks.description: Ensure task creation, movement, and deletion survive Source UI restarts.
tasks.definition_of_done: Ensure task creation, movement, and deletion survive Source UI restarts and the canonical artifact at workspace/source-ui/source_mission.json is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Task mutations now persist into the canonical machine-readable portfolio.

tasks.title: [Dali] Instrument mission observability and task provenance
tasks.description: Expose enough logs and notifications to see mission state changes and agent handoffs.
tasks.definition_of_done: Expose enough logs and notifications to see mission state changes and agent handoffs and the canonical artifact at workspace/source-ui/app.py is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Mission state changes now emit notifications, logs, and backlog-return provenance.

tasks.title: [Dali] Implement c_lawd-Dali handoff substrate
tasks.description: Create the execution substrate for assignee-visible handoffs and return payloads.
tasks.definition_of_done: Create the execution substrate for assignee-visible handoffs and return payloads and the canonical artifact at workspace/exchanges is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Handoff records and return payloads are now part of canonical Source mission state.

tasks.title: [Dali] Build pilot metrics dashboard for Source progress
tasks.description: Track mission progress across cognition, memory, coordination, and relationship health.
tasks.definition_of_done: Track mission progress across cognition, memory, coordination, and relationship health and the canonical artifact at workspace/source-ui/static/js/app.js is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Queued after observability and handoff substrate work.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Define Think-Together Contract
tasks.description: Specify the shared inquiry structure for question, hypothesis, evidence, uncertainty, synthesis, and decision.
tasks.definition_of_done: Specify the shared inquiry structure for question, hypothesis, evidence, uncertainty, synthesis, and decision and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_thinking_contract.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Think-Together contract is authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Define Feel-Together State Model
tasks.description: Map TACTI-aligned states for trust, rupture, repair, arousal, novelty, and coherence.
tasks.definition_of_done: Map TACTI-aligned states for trust, rupture, repair, arousal, novelty, and coherence and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_relational_state_spec.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Feel-Together relational state model is authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Specify Memory Meaning Layer
tasks.description: Define the semantic categories that qualify as memories, commitments, and durable doctrine.
tasks.definition_of_done: Define the semantic categories that qualify as memories, commitments, and durable doctrine and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_memory_semantics.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Memory meaning layer is authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Draft Collaborative Inquiry Template
tasks.description: Turn live conversation into a reusable structure for deliberation and remembered decisions.
tasks.definition_of_done: Turn live conversation into a reusable structure for deliberation and remembered decisions and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_collaborative_inquiry_template.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Collaborative inquiry template is authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Create Rupture-and-Repair Playbook
tasks.description: Define how Source recognizes misattunement and returns to relational coherence.
tasks.definition_of_done: Define how Source recognizes misattunement and returns to relational coherence and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_repair_playbook.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Rupture-and-repair playbook is authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Define c_lawd-Dali Handoff Grammar
tasks.description: Specify the minimal envelope for intent, context, uncertainty, evidence, and expected return shape.
tasks.definition_of_done: Specify the minimal envelope for intent, context, uncertainty, evidence, and expected return shape and the canonical artifact at workspace/exchanges/c_lawd_dali_handoff_contract.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: c_lawd-Dali handoff grammar is authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Define Conversation-to-Memory Promotion Rules
tasks.description: Set thresholds for when interaction content becomes durable memory rather than transient chat.
tasks.definition_of_done: Set thresholds for when interaction content becomes durable memory rather than transient chat and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_memory_promotion_rules.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Conversation-to-memory promotion rules are authored in canonical docs.

tasks.title: [c_lawd] Create Weekly Reflection Loop
tasks.description: Distill lessons, regressions, and next experiments into a recurring evolution artifact.
tasks.definition_of_done: Distill lessons, regressions, and next experiments into a recurring evolution artifact and the canonical artifact at workspace/docs/source_artifacts/c_lawd_weekly_reflection_loop.md is updated.
tasks.status_reason: Queued after memory semantics and promotion rules are in place.

notifications.title: Mission task metadata normalized
notifications.body: Source mission tasks now carry origin, mission IDs, sequence, definition-of-done, and status reasons.

notifications.title: Mission observability live
notifications.body: Source UI now reconciles backlog outcomes into task state, notifications, logs, and handoffs.

notifications.title: c_lawd contract suite published
notifications.body: Think, feel, memory, repair, and handoff contract artifacts are now present in canonical docs.

notifications.title: Mission portfolio synced
notifications.body: Source UI is now loading tasks and agents from the canonical mission portfolio.

notifications.title: c_lawd lane appended
notifications.body: The mission backlog now includes an explicit [c_lawd] task lane beside Dali.

notifications.title: Agents picked up mission work
notifications.body: Dali started mission canonicalization and c_lawd started the Think-Together contract.

logs.message: Normalized Source mission task metadata for backlog ingest compatibility.
Source UI now reconciles backlog outcomes into mission logs, notifications, and handoffs.
Published c_lawd doctrine and handoff contract artifacts.
Appended explicit c_lawd mission lane to shared backlog
Marked Dali and c_lawd as actively working mission tasks
